cropInfo.recommendedText: Your plants are overheating and the soil is very dry. Water them promptly and, if possible, provide some shade or cover to reduce heat stress and prevent further damage.
cropInfo.explanationText: All systems are running in automatic mode. The farm is monitoring temperature, soil moisture, and light intensity continuously. Actuators will activate automatically when thresholds are exceeded.

help_step1_title: Open Home Assistant in your browser
help_step1_desc: Open your web browser and navigate to the Home Assistant address below. Make sure your device is connected to the same local network as the Raspberry Pi.
help_step2_desc: Enter your username and password on the login screen, then click the Log in button. Check "Keep me logged in" if you want to stay connected.
help_step3_desc: After logging in you will land on the Dashboard. Click your username at the bottom-left of the sidebar to open your profile page.
help_step4_desc: In your profile page you will find two tabs: General and Security. Click on Security to proceed.
help_step5_desc: Scroll down to the "Long-lived access tokens" section. Click Create token, name it (e.g. sahlafarm), and copy the token immediately.
help_step5_warning_bold: The token is only displayed once.
help_step5_warning_text: Copy it right away and paste it into the Settings page.
help_step6_desc: Open the SahlaFarm web application and go to your Settings/Profile page. This is where you will link your farm's hardware to the dashboard.
help_step6_extra_p2: The update card (shown below) will appear. Enter your URL, paste your token, and click
help_pro_tip_text1: Look for the connection status badge to turn
help_pro_tip_text2: This confirms the web application is successfully receiving live data.
help_header_desc: Follow these steps to link your Raspberry Pi instance to the SahlaFarm dashboard.
hero_desc: Sahla Farm bridges traditional farming knowledge with real-time IoT data, AI-powered insights, and intelligent automation — making smart agriculture accessible to every farmer.
features_desc: Six core capabilities that transform raw environmental data into clear, actionable farm management.
features_f1_desc: Four environmental sensors track soil moisture, temperature, air humidity, and light intensity — refreshed continuously so you never miss a critical change.
features_f2_desc: Chat with an intelligent assistant that understands your crop type, growth stage, and current conditions to give precise, context-aware recommendations.
features_f3_desc: Frost risk, heavy rainfall, overwatering — Sahla Farm detects environmental threats before they cause damage and alerts you instantly.
features_f4_desc: Automate your pump and ventilation systems. Switch between fully automatic, semi-automatic, or manual modes — complete control at every level.
features_f5_desc: Visual monitoring of your crops from anywhere in the world. Never miss a critical visual change in field conditions or plant health.
features_f6_desc: 7-day sensor histories with interactive charts. Understand patterns, compare crop cycles, and make smarter decisions based on your farm's real data.
how_desc: No technical expertise required. The Sahla Box does the heavy lifting.
how_s1_desc: Place the Sahla Box in your field. Connect power. That's it — it self-configures using your Wi-Fi or GSM connection.
how_s2_desc: Select your crop type, growth stage, and farming mode. Sahla Farm tailors its monitoring and recommendations to your exact situation.
how_s3_desc: Your dashboard comes alive with live sensor data, charts, alerts, and actuator status — accessible from any device, anywhere.
how_s4_desc: Receive personalized recommendations from the AI advisor. Automate irrigation, manage ventilation, and grow with confidence.
dash_desc: A command center designed to surface exactly what matters — clean, fast, and actionable.
dash_crop_ai: AI: Water promptly — soil is very dry and overheating detected.
about_p1: Sahla Farm was born from a real-world challenge: how can farmers monitor their crops efficiently without expensive infrastructure or technical barriers?
about_p2: We are a team passionate about technology and sustainability. Instead of overwhelming farmers with complexity, we focused on building a solution that is intuitive, reliable, and scalable.
about_mission_text: Simplify smart agriculture through reliable IoT systems every farmer can use.
about_vision_text: Farms that are connected, efficient, and sustainable — technology enhancing nature.
about_v1_desc: Edge computing ensures your farm stays monitored even without internet connectivity.
about_v2_desc: Plug & Play setup. No engineers needed — any farmer can deploy Sahla in minutes.
about_v3_desc: From a small greenhouse to a large farm — Sahla grows with your operation seamlessly.
bene_1_desc: Precise irrigation scheduling eliminates waste and ensures crops get exactly what they need.
bene_2_desc: Optimal growing conditions maintained round the clock lead to healthier, more productive harvests.
bene_3_desc: No engineering degree required. If you can plug in a device, you can run a smart farm.
cta_desc: Join farmers already using Sahla Farm to reduce waste, increase yields, and farm with confidence.
contact_desc: Whether you're a small greenhouse grower or a large-scale operation, we'd love to show you how Sahla Farm can transform your workflow.
contact_msg_ph: Tell us about your farm and what you're looking for...
contact_success: ✓ Message sent! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
footer_desc: Smarter farms, stronger yields, sustainable futures. Innovation in the palm of your hands.
